title: FULL PANEL Anton Osika(Lovable), Marius Meiners(Peec AI) and Harry Stebbings(20VC) | Antler Global

segments.text: I'm very excited to kick off the second
part of our event today. Um I'm Adam
French, one of the partners here at
Antler leading our UK fund. And um I
know Sarah was very excited about the
last panel. Um elite athletes obviously
living several dreams of hers, but you
know, I feel like this is going to be
the panel of the day. Um we have not
elite athletes, but elite individuals
who are also our peers. And so I am
delighted to welcome to the stage two of
our portfolio companies at Antler. We've
got uh one the founder is uh the founder
of one of the fastest growing software
businesses in the world. Um the other uh
the founder is one of Germany's fastest
growing AI companies. Uh and alongside
them we also have one of the most
influential voices and investors within
the European ecosystem. And so please
help me to welcome to the stage Anton
from Lovable. We got Marius from PKI.
And of course we got Harry from 20VC.
[Music]
So welcome gentlemen. Thank you so much
for for being here. Um maybe also worth
saying that Harry is also an investor in
both PKI and in lovable. Um but Anton,
let's uh let's start with you. So um
right now you're running one of the
hottest startups in the world. Um and
today we're talking about this outlier
mindset. So paint us a picture. What
does a day in the life of Anton look
like?
>> Yeah. Let me first just say great to be
here and it's fun. Every second time on
I'm on a stage this guy is also there.
>> You're on a lot of stages these days,
dude.
>> You too.
>> You can have so much fun with this
question. By the way,
>> from a day in life, you get up at 4:00
a.m. You do your journaling. Then you go
to the ice bath.
>> Yeah. I meditate also.
>> Yeah. I'm also there obviously.
>> I love ice bing.
>> Yeah, we do. But that was cold.
>> Um and then I do my sauna. And then um
I'm I'm still in actually I live in a
co-l livingiving place like a hacker
house. And um

>> This is this is the truth. Yes.
the truth as well before.

I I still spend a lot of time on that.
I work hard so I go often times come

think about a year ago, is much changed

>> Definitely. like a year ago we we we

I think the mic is

one of my biggest learnings is that in

software like lovable it's quite easy to
like
